---
title: "News & Community Hub"
toc: false
---

::: {.community-page}

::: {.news-action-bar}
[Submit a contribution &rarr;](../contact/index.qmd#community-contributions){.news-header-action}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
/* Estilos locales encapsulados para News & Community Hub */
.news-hub-layout {
  width: min(1180px, calc(100vw - 3rem));
  margin: 1.75rem auto 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(640px, 760px) minmax(280px, 320px);
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: start;
  justify-content: center;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

@media (min-width: 1100px) {
  .news-hub-layout {
    transform: translateX(-2.25rem);
  }
}

.news-hub-main {
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

.news-hub-aside {
  min-width: 280px;
  width: 100%;
}

@media (min-width: 981px) {
  .news-hub-aside {
    position: sticky;
    top: 6rem;
  }
}

.news-side-highlight-card {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 320px;
  min-width: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid #e5eaf0;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  background: #ffffff;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: inherit;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
}

.news-side-highlight-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(0, 150, 136, 0.35);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09);
}

.news-side-highlight-media {
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  display: block;
  overflow: visible;
}

.news-side-highlight-media img {
  width: 100%;
  max-height: 105px;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
  border: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
}

.news-side-highlight-content,
.news-side-highlight-content h3,
.news-side-highlight-content p,
.news-side-highlight-meta,
.news-side-highlight-link {
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-wrap: normal;
  word-break: normal;
  hyphens: none;
}

.news-side-highlight-kicker {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  color: #009688;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.news-side-highlight-content h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem 0;
  color: #17233a;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.28;
}

.news-side-highlight-meta {
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem 0;
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.news-side-highlight-content p {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  line-height: 1.48;
}

.news-side-highlight-link {
  color: #009688;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .news-hub-layout {
    width: min(100%, calc(100vw - 1.5rem));
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 1.5rem;
    transform: none;
  }

  .news-hub-aside {
    min-width: 0;
    position: static;
  }

  .news-side-highlight-card {
    max-width: 100%;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="news-hub-layout">
  <main class="news-hub-main">
    <div class="community-filter-bar">
      <span class="filter-label">Filter by:</span>
      
      <div class="filter-controls">
        <select id="typeFilter" class="form-select form-select-sm" aria-label="Filter by Type">
          <option value="all">All Types</option>
          <option value="news">News</option>
          <option value="event">Event</option>
          <option value="call">Opportunity/Call</option>
          <option value="publication">Publication</option>
          <option value="resource">Resource</option>
        </select>
        
        <select id="categoryFilter" class="form-select form-select-sm" aria-label="Filter by Category">
          <option value="all">All Categories</option>
        </select>
        
        <select id="languageFilter" class="form-select form-select-sm" aria-label="Filter by Language">
          <option value="all">All Languages</option>
        </select>

        <span class="sort-label">Sort by:</span>

        <select id="sort-mode" class="form-select form-select-sm" aria-label="Sort by">
          <option value="date_desc">Newest first</option>
          <option value="deadline_asc">Deadline</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="latest-contributions-container">
      <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
        <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </main>

  <aside class="news-hub-aside" aria-label="News highlights">
    <a class="news-side-highlight-card" href="../activities/index.html">
      <div class="news-side-highlight-media">
        <img src="../images/logos/ISA2027.png" alt="ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027">
      </div>

      <div class="news-side-highlight-content">
        <span class="news-side-highlight-kicker">Highlight</span>
        <h3>XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027</h3>
        <p class="news-side-highlight-meta">July 4–10, 2027 · Gwangju, South Korea</p>
        <p>Global Sociology in Turbulent Times.</p>
        <span class="news-side-highlight-link">View activity →</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </aside>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", async function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('latest-contributions-container');
  const typeFilter = document.getElementById('typeFilter');
  const categoryFilter = document.getElementById('categoryFilter');
  const languageFilter = document.getElementById('languageFilter');
  let allData = [];

  try {
    const response = await fetch("../data/community_submissions.json");
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    allData = await response.json();
    
    // Add original index for stable fallback sorting
    allData = allData.map((item, index) => ({
      ...item,
      __originalIndex: index
    }));
    
    // Initial sort logic applies on load
    
    if (allData.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No community contributions are available yet.</p>';
      return;
    }
    
    populateFilters(allData);
    
    typeFilter.addEventListener('change', () => renderCards(allData));
    categoryFilter.addEventListener('change', () => renderCards(allData));
    languageFilter.addEventListener('change', () => renderCards(allData));
    
    const sortMode = document.getElementById('sort-mode');
    if (sortMode) {
      sortMode.addEventListener('change', () => renderCards(allData));
    }

    renderCards(allData);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Failed to load community submissions:", error);
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No community contributions are available yet.</p>';
  }

  
  function parseDate(value) {
    if (!value) return null;
    const date = new Date(value);
    return isNaN(date.getTime()) ? null : date;
  }

  function getDeadline(item) {
    return (
      item.deadline ||
      item.date_deadline ||
      item.submission_deadline ||
      item.closing_date ||
      item.due_date ||
      item.date_due ||
      item.relevant_date ||
      ""
    );
  }

  function parseSubmissionIdDate(value) {
    if (!value) return null;
    const str = value.toString();
    const match = str.match(/(\d{8})[-_]?(\d{6})?/);
    if (!match) return null;

    const datePart = match[1];
    const timePart = match[2] || "000000";

    const year = datePart.slice(0, 4);
    const month = datePart.slice(4, 6);
    const day = datePart.slice(6, 8);

    const hour = timePart.slice(0, 2);
    const minute = timePart.slice(2, 4);
    const second = timePart.slice(4, 6);

    const parsed = new Date(`${year}-${month}-${day}T${hour}:${minute}:${second}`);
    return isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed;
  }

  function getContributionCreatedDate(item) {
    return (
      parseSubmissionIdDate(item.submission_id) ||
      parseSubmissionIdDate(item.id) ||
      parseDate(item.created_at) ||
      parseDate(item.submitted_at) ||
      parseDate(item.date_submitted) ||
      parseDate(item.form_timestamp) ||
      parseDate(item.timestamp) ||
      null
    );
  }

  function sortByContributionOrderDesc(data) {
    return [...data].sort((a, b) => {
      const da = getContributionCreatedDate(a);
      const db = getContributionCreatedDate(b);

      if (da && db) return db - da;
      if (db && !da) return 1;
      if (da && !db) return -1;

      const ia = typeof a.__originalIndex === "number" ? a.__originalIndex : 0;
      const ib = typeof b.__originalIndex === "number" ? b.__originalIndex : 0;
      return ib - ia;
    });
  }

  function isDeadlinePassed(item) {
    const deadlineValue = getDeadline(item);
    const deadlineDate = parseDate(deadlineValue);
    if (!deadlineDate) return false;

    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

    const deadlineDay = new Date(deadlineDate);
    deadlineDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);

    return deadlineDay < today;
  }

  function sortData(data) {
    const sortMode = document.getElementById('sort-mode');
    const mode = sortMode ? sortMode.value : "date_desc";
    const sorted = [...data];

    if (mode === "deadline_asc") {
      sorted.sort((a, b) => {
        const aExpired = isDeadlinePassed(a);
        const bExpired = isDeadlinePassed(b);

        if (!aExpired && bExpired) return -1;
        if (aExpired && !bExpired) return 1;

        const da = parseDate(getDeadline(a));
        const db = parseDate(getDeadline(b));

        if (da && db) return da - db;
        if (da && !db) return -1;
        if (!da && db) return 1;

        const pa = parseDate(a.date_published);
        const pb = parseDate(b.date_published);
        if (pa && pb) return pb - pa;
        return 0;
      });
      return sorted;
    }

    return sortByContributionOrderDesc(sorted);
  }

  function populateFilters(data) {
    const categories = new Set();
    const languages = new Set();
    data.forEach(item => {
      if (item.category) categories.add(item.category);
      if (item.language) languages.add(item.language);
    });
    
    Array.from(categories).sort().forEach(c => {
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = c.toLowerCase();
      opt.textContent = c;
      categoryFilter.appendChild(opt);
    });
    
    Array.from(languages).sort().forEach(l => {
      const opt = document.createElement('option');
      opt.value = l.toLowerCase();
      opt.textContent = l;
      languageFilter.appendChild(opt);
    });
  }

  function formatLabel(value) {
    if (!value) return "";
    return value
      .toString()
      .replace(/_/g, " ")
      .replace(/-/g, " ")
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
  }

  function normalizeType(t) {
    if (!t) return 'other';
    const l = t.toLowerCase();
    if (l.includes('news')) return 'news';
    if (l.includes('event')) return 'event';
    if (l.includes('resource')) return 'resource';
    if (l.includes('call') || l.includes('opportunity')) return 'call';
    if (l.includes('publication')) return 'publication';
    if (l.includes('experience')) return 'experience';
    return 'other';
  }
  
  function getTypeImage(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    const imageMap = {
      news: "../images/community-types/news.svg",
      event: "../images/community-types/event.svg",
      resource: "../images/community-types/resource.svg",
      call: "../images/community-types/call.svg",
      publication: "../images/community-types/publication.svg",
      experience: "../images/community-types/experience.svg",
      other: "../images/community-types/other.svg"
    };
    return imageMap[normalized] || imageMap.other;
  }
  
  function getTypeAltText(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    const altMap = {
      news: "News icon",
      event: "Event icon",
      resource: "Resource icon",
      call: "Call icon",
      publication: "Publication icon",
      experience: "Experience icon",
      other: "Other icon"
    };
    return altMap[normalized] || altMap.other;
  }

  
  function getRelevantDateLabel(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    if (normalized === "call") return "Deadline";
    if (normalized === "event") return "Event date";
    if (normalized === "publication") return "Publication date";
    return "Relevant date";
  }

  function formatDate(dateString) {
    if (!dateString) return "";
    const date = new Date(dateString + "T00:00:00");
    if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return escapeHtml(dateString);
    return date.toLocaleDateString("en", {
      year: "numeric",
      month: "short",
      day: "numeric"
    });
  }

  function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
    return (unsafe || "").toString()
         .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
         .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
         .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
         .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
         .replace(/'/g, "&#039;");
  }

  function renderCards(data) {
    const typeVal = typeFilter.value;
    const catVal = categoryFilter.value;
    const langVal = languageFilter.value;
    
    let filtered = sortData(data.filter(item => {
      const tMatch = typeVal === 'all' || normalizeType(item.type) === typeVal;
      const cMatch = catVal === 'all' || (item.category && item.category.toLowerCase() === catVal);
      const lMatch = langVal === 'all' || (item.language && item.language.toLowerCase() === langVal);
      return tMatch && cMatch && lMatch;
    }));

    if (filtered.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No contributions match the selected filters.</p>';
      return;
    }

    let html = '<div class="contributions-list">';
    filtered.forEach((item, index) => {
      const expired = isDeadlinePassed(item);
      const expiredClass = expired ? " contribution-expired" : "";
      const isFirst = index === 0 ? 'open' : '';
      const title = escapeHtml(item.title);
      const desc = escapeHtml(item.description);
      const type = escapeHtml(item.type);
      const cat = escapeHtml(item.category);
      const date = escapeHtml(item.date_published);
      const relevantDate = escapeHtml(item.relevant_date || "");
      const url = escapeHtml(item.url || '');
      const org = escapeHtml(item.organization || item.territory || '');
      const lang = escapeHtml(item.language || '');
      
      const tags = (item.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="badge">${escapeHtml(t)}</span>`).join('');
      const cardTitle = url ? `<a href="${url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${title}</a>` : title;
      
      const kickerParts = [];
      if (item.type) kickerParts.push(formatLabel(item.type));
      if (item.category) kickerParts.push(formatLabel(item.category));
      const kicker = kickerParts.join(" &middot; ").replace(/&middot;/g, "·");
      
      const imgSrc = getTypeImage(item.type);
      const imgAlt = getTypeAltText(item.type);
      
      let metaHtml = '';
      if (org) metaHtml += `<span>${org}</span>`;
      if (lang) metaHtml += `<span>${lang}</span>`;
      
      let datesHtml = '';
      if (date) datesHtml += `<span>Posted: ${formatDate(date)}</span>`;
      const deadlineRaw = getDeadline(item);
      const deadlineVal = escapeHtml(deadlineRaw);
      if (deadlineVal) {
        const label = getRelevantDateLabel(item.type);
        datesHtml += `<span>${label}: ${formatDate(deadlineVal)}${expired ? ' <span class="contribution-status contribution-status-closed">Closed</span>' : ''}</span>`;
      }
      
      let combinedMeta = '';
      if (datesHtml) combinedMeta += `<div class="community-card-dates">${datesHtml}</div>`;
      if (metaHtml) combinedMeta += `<div class="contribution-meta">${metaHtml}</div>`;
      
      html += `
        <details class="contribution-item${expiredClass}" ${isFirst}>
          <summary class="contribution-summary">
            <div class="contribution-icon">
              <img src="${imgSrc}" alt="${imgAlt}">
            </div>

            <div class="contribution-summary-main">
              <div class="contribution-kicker">${kicker}</div>
              <h3 class="contribution-title">${cardTitle}</h3>
              <p class="contribution-preview">${desc}</p>
              ${combinedMeta}
            </div>

            <div class="contribution-summary-side">
              ${tags ? `<div class="contribution-summary-tags">${tags}</div>` : ''}
              <div class="contribution-toggle-indicator" aria-hidden="true"><span class="toggle-closed">Read more ↓</span><span class="toggle-open">Show less ↑</span></div>
            </div>
          </summary>

          <div class="contribution-details">
            <p class="contribution-desc">${desc}</p>
            ${url ? `<a href="${url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="contribution-link">Open contribution &rarr;</a>` : ''}
          </div>
        </details>
      `;
    });
    html += '</div>';
    container.innerHTML = html;
  }
});
</script>
```
:::
